testcase.name: Item-Summation Balance Constraint
testcase.description: Detect violations of the constraints among the balance attribute and calculation summation item arcs as documented in Table 7 of section 5.4.2

variation.name: Item and summation have no balance attribute
variation.description: 208.01 When the item and summation have no balance attribute they are consistent

variation.name: Item and summation have no balance attribute
variation.description: 208.01 When the item and summation have no balance attribute they are consistent

variation.name: Item credit, Summation credit, weight +1
variation.description: 208.02 If an item is a credit, and the item it sums to is a credit, its weight MUST be +1 (greater than 0)

variation.name: Item credit, Summation credit, weight +1, calc 1.1
variation.description: 208.02 If an item is a credit, and the item it sums to is a credit, its weight MUST be +1 (greater than 0), calc 1.1

variation.name: Item credit, Summation credit, weight -1
variation.description: 208.03 If an item is a credit and the item it sums to is a credit, its weight MUST NOT be -1 (less than 0)

variation.name: Item credit, Summation credit, weight -1, calc 1.1
variation.description: 208.03 If an item is a credit and the item it sums to is a credit, its weight MUST NOT be -1 (less than 0), calc 1.1

variation.name: Item debit, Summation credit, weight +1
variation.description: 208.04 If an item is a debit, and the item it sums to is a credit, its weight MUST NOT be +1 (greater than 0)

variation.name: Item debit, Summation credit, weight +1, calc 1.1
variation.description: 208.04 If an item is a debit, and the item it sums to is a credit, its weight MUST NOT be +1 (greater than 0), calc 1.1

variation.name: Item debit, Summation credit, weight -1
variation.description: 208.05 If an item is a debit, and the item it sums to is a credit, its weight MUST be -1 (less than 0)

variation.name: Item credit, Summation debit, weight +1
variation.description: 208.06 If an item is a credit, and the item it sums to is a credit, its weight MUST NOT be +1 (greater than 0)

variation.name: Item credit, Summation debit, weight -1
variation.description: 208.07 If an item is a credit, and the item it sums to is a debit, its weight MUST be -1 (less than 0)

variation.name: Item debit, Summation debit, weight +1
variation.description: 208.08 If an item is a debit, and the item it sums to is a debit, its weight MUST be +1 (greater than 0)

variation.name: Item debit, Summation debit, weight -1
variation.description: 208.09 If an item is a debit, and the item it sums to is a debit, its weight MUST NOT be -1 (less than 0)

variation.name: Value of weight attribute must not be 0
variation.description: 208.10 The value of a weight attribute MUST NOT be 0 (zero)

variation.name: Value of weight attribute must not be 0, calc 1.1
variation.description: 208.10 The value of a weight attribute MUST NOT be 0 (zero), calc 1.1
